API docs by Redocly

CienciasNET API (1.0.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

Contrato HTTP autoritativo para la SPA y estaciones web de CienciasNET. Las reglas de negocio provienen de docs/domain y los permisos de docs/security.

Core

API-CORE

getHealth

Responses

Desarrollo local

http://localhost:8000/api/v1/health

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "status": "ok"
    }
}

Auth

API-AUTH

login

Request Body schema: application/json
required
email
required
string <email>
password
required
string <password>
remember
boolean
Default: false

Responses

Desarrollo local

http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "password": "pa$$word",
  • "remember": false
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 422
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
    • "name": "string",
    • "email": "user@example.com",
    • "active": true,
    • "roles": [
      • "superadmin"
      ],
    • "permissions": [
      • "string"
      ]
    }
}

getSession

Authorizations:
sanctumSession

Responses

Desarrollo local

http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/session

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08",
    • "name": "string",
    • "email": "user@example.com",
    • "active": true,
    • "roles": [
      • "superadmin"
      ],
    • "permissions": [
      • "string"
      ]
    }
}

logout

Authorizations:
sanctumSession

Responses

Desarrollo local

http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/logout

Response samples

  • 401
  • 419
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": {
    • "code": "string",
    • "message": "string",
    • "fields": {
      • "property1": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "property2": [
        • "string"
        ]
      }
    }
}

requestPasswordRecovery

Request Body schema: application/json
required
email
required
string <email>

Responses

Desarrollo local

http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/forgot-password

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "user@example.com"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 422
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "message": "string"
    }
}

resetPassword

Request Body schema: application/json
required
token
required
string
email
required
string <email>
password
required
string <password> >= 8 characters

Responses

Desarrollo local

http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/reset-password

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "token": "string",
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "password": "pa$$word"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 422
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "message": "string"
    }
}

IdentityAccess

API-IAM

listAccounts

Authorizations:
sanctumSession
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
search
string <= 150 characters
active
boolean

Responses

Desarrollo local

http://localhost:8000/api/v1/accounts

Response samples

  • 200
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "current_page": 0,
    • "from": 0,
    • "last_page": 0,
    • "per_page": 0,
    • "to": 0,
    • "total": 0
    },
  • "links": {
    • "first": "string",
    • "last": "string",
    • "prev": "string",
    • "next": "string"
    }
}

createAccount

Authorizations:
sanctumSession
Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string [ 1 .. 150 ] characters
email
required
string <email>
roles
required
Array of strings (Role) non-empty unique
Items Enum: "superadmin" "gestor_usuarios" "toe" "psicologia" "auxiliar" "coordinador_academico" "administrativo" "docente" "padre" "alumno"

Responses

Desarrollo local

http://localhost:8000/api/v1/accounts

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "email": "user@example.com",
  • "roles": [
    • "superadmin"
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 403
  • 409
  • 422
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
    }
}

getAccount

Authorizations:
sanctumSession
path Parameters
accountId
required
string <uuid>

Responses

Desarrollo local

http://localhost:8000/api/v1/accounts/{accountId}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
    }
}

updateAccount

Authorizations:
sanctumSession
path Parameters
accountId
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
string [ 1 .. 150 ] characters
email
string <email>

Responses

Desarrollo local

http://localhost:8000/api/v1/accounts/{accountId}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "email": "user@example.com"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 422
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
    }
}

setAccountActivation

Authorizations:
sanctumSession
path Parameters
accountId
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
active
required
boolean
reason
string <= 500 characters

Responses

Desarrollo local

http://localhost:8000/api/v1/accounts/{accountId}/activation

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "active": true,
  • "reason": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
    }
}

replaceAccountRoles

Authorizations:
sanctumSession
path Parameters
accountId
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
roles
required
Array of strings (Role) unique
Items Enum: "superadmin" "gestor_usuarios" "toe" "psicologia" "auxiliar" "coordinador_academico" "administrativo" "docente" "padre" "alumno"

Responses

Desarrollo local

http://localhost:8000/api/v1/accounts/{accountId}/roles

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "roles": [
    • "superadmin"
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
    }
}

issueAccountPasswordReset

Authorizations:
sanctumSession
path Parameters
accountId
required
string <uuid>

Responses

Desarrollo local

http://localhost:8000/api/v1/accounts/{accountId}/password-reset

  • 404

application/json

API-FAMILY

listFamilyLinks

Authorizations:
sanctumSession
query Parameters
page
integer >= 1
Default: 1
per_page
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
student_id
string <uuid>

Responses

  • 403

    • "last_page": 0,
    • "per_page": 0,

    • "total": 0
    },
  • "links": {
    • "first": "string",
    • "last": "string",
    • "prev": "string",
    • "next": "string"
    }
}

sanctumSession
Request Body schema: application/json
required
parent_account_id
required
string <uuid>
student_id
required
string <uuid>
relationship
required
string
Enum: "padre" "madre" "apoderado"

createAcademicPeriod

Authorizations:
sanctumSession
Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string [ 1 .. 100 ] characters
start_date
required
string <date>
end_date
required
string <date>
status
string
Enum: "draft" "active" "closed"

Responses

Desarrollo local

http://localhost:8000/api/v1/academic-periods

sanctumSession
Request Body schema: application/json
required
student_id
required
string <uuid>
legal_basis
required
string [ 1 .. 1000 ] characters
expires_at
string <date-time>

Responses

Desarrollo local

http://localhost:8000/api/v1/biometric-consents

Content type

Content type
application/json

    • "id": "497f6eca-6276-4993-bfeb-53cbbbba6f08"
    }
}

Authorizations:
sanctumSession
path Parameters
consentId
required
string <uuid>
Request Body schema: application/json
required
reason
required
string [ 3 .. 1000 ] characters

application/json

createStudentBenefit

Authorizations:
sanctumSession
Request Body schema: application/json
required
student_id
required
string <uuid>
benefit_type
required
string
Enum: "percentage" "fixed" "waiver"
value
string or null^\d{1,10}(\.\d{1,2})?$

Obligatorio para porcentaje o monto fijo; nulo para exoneración.

concept_ids
Array of strings <uuid> unique [ items <uuid > ]
stackable_with_early_payment
boolean
Default: false
starts_on
required
string <date>
ends_on
string <date>

Responses

ends_at

required

required
string [ 1 .. 10000 ] characters
audience_type
required
string

audience_ids
Array of strings <uuid> non-empty unique [ items <uuid > ]
publish_at
string <date-time>

sanctumSession
header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
required
string [ 8 .. 191 ] characters
Request Body schema: application/json
required
from_date

string <date>
to_date
required
string <date>
format
required
string
Enum: "pdf" "xlsx"
status
string
Enum: "open" "referred_toe" "referred_psychology" "parent_notified" "in_progress" "resolved" "closed"
severity
string
Enum: "low" "medium" "high" "critical"
